arts.ttl: Deal today: Star to fly in to complete Manchester United transfer in next 24 hours
arts.sum: Manchester United and Lecce are reportedly expected to finalise the transfer of Danish left-back Patrick Dorgu today. The player is then set to fly to Manchester to complete his move to Old Trafford tomorrow, according to Gianluca Di Marzio. arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: TWO Man Utd signings, Mathys Tel-Chelsea, Joao Felix EXIT Romano has confirmed that Patrick Dorgu is set to become Ruben Amorim’s first major signing at Manchester United, revealing some good news for the Old Trafford club about the player’s fee.

arts.ttl: Despite previous denials Marcus Rashford takes emergency action to force through transfer
arts.sum: It seems almost certain that Marcus Rashford will leave Man United this month, and now the player has apparently taken emergency action to ensure that’s the case. Barcelona have agreed personal terms with Rashford, though it’s understood that the Catalan club are still struggling to be able to afford the loan fee for the player.
